import io
import string

fn rot13_byte(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    (b - 65 + 13) % 26 + 65
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    (b - 97 + 13) % 26 + 97
  else
    b
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let len = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < len
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(byte)
      byte
    when None
      0
    end
    let new_b = rot13_byte(b)
    result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(new_b)}"
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
